title: Ralph Lauren: Poised To Benefit From An Eventual Recovery In Demand
text: Ralph Lauren has seen strong revenue growth in Europe and Asia, offsetting lower sales in North America. The company continues to show an attractive quick ratio and P/E ratio. The stock is in a good position to see a rebound if the appetite for North American luxury spending recovers.

title: Ralph Lauren Warns Americans Are Cutting Back on Discretionary Spending
text: Shares of Ralph Lauren lost ground after the fashion clothing company warned American consumers are cutting back on discretionary spending.

title: Markets Advanced at Midday as Consumer Inflation Rose Less Than Expected
text: U.S. equities gained at midday on Thursday, Aug. 10, 2023 after the Labor Department reported consumer prices increased less than expected in July.

title: Ralph Lauren Corporation (RL) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Ralph Lauren Corporation (NYSE:RL ) Q1 2024 Earnings Conference Call August 10, 2023 9:00 AM ET Corporate Participants Corinna Van der Ghinst - Vice President of Investor Relations Patrice Louvet - President and Chief Executive Officer Jane Nielsen - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Matt Boss - JPMorgan Jay Sole - UBS Laurent Vasilescu - BNP Paribas Dana Telsey - Telsey Advisory Group Chris Nardone - Bank of America Bob Drbul - Guggenheim Tracy Kogan - Citigroup John Kernan - TD Cowen Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Ralph Lauren First Quarter Fiscal Year 2024 Earnings Call.

title: Core CPI Inflation In Line With Estimates in July
text: Pre-market indices are up rather strongly this morning, and even higher upon the release of Consumer Price Index (CPI) for July and Jobless Claims reports for the past couple weeks an hour ahead of today's opening bell. In fact, pre-market futures spiked as a direct result of this data, especially the CPI.

title: Ralph Lauren (RL) Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Ralph Lauren's (RL) Q1 results benefit from robust demand and brand strength. However, muted consumer spending, inflation and currency woes are concerning.

title: Here's What Key Metrics Tell Us About Ralph Lauren (RL) Q1 Earnings
text: The headline numbers for Ralph Lauren (RL) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended June 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Ralph Lauren (RL) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Ralph Lauren (RL) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.34 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.15 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.88 per share a year ago.

title: Ralph Lauren sees growth slow as US sales fall
text: Ralph Lauren Corporation (NYSE:RL), the fashion group, reported little year-on-year growth for both sales and underlying profits in the first quarter of the 2024 financial year, a company statement revealed. Sales reached US$1.5 billion for the period, representing a 1% increase versus 2023's figures, while underlying profits rose by US$10 million to reach US$200 million for the quarter.

title: Ralph Lauren Stock Is Falling. It's About the Guidance.
text: The premium apparel company posts fiscal first-quarter adjusted earnings of $2.34 a share. Wall Street had expected $2.14.

title: Ralph Lauren's stock falls toward a 5th-straight loss after downbeat outlook, while earnings beat views
text: Shares of Ralph Lauren Corp. RL, -1.28% took a 3.2% hit toward a fifth-straight loss in premarket trading Thursday, after the luxury lifestyle products company beat fiscal first-quarter earnings expectations but provided a somewhat downbeat second-quarter outlook, amid inflationary and consumer spending-related headwinds. Net income for the quarter to July 1 rose to $132.1 million, or $1.96 a share, from $123.4 million, or $1.73 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Ralph Lauren Reports First Quarter Fiscal 2024 Results and Reiterates Full Year Outlook
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--RALPH LAUREN REPORTS FIRST QUARTER FISCAL 2024 RESULTS.

title: Ralph Lauren 1Q profit jump expected with revenue seen slightly lower
text: Ralph Lauren is expected to post strong profit growth year-over-year when it reports its financial results for the first quarter fiscal 2024 before the market opens on Thursday, August 10. For the quarter, analysts expect the luxury lifestyle brand to report earnings per share (EPS) of $2.15, according to Zacks Consensus Estimate.

title: Why Ralph Lauren (RL) Might Surprise This Earnings Season
text: Ralph Lauren (RL) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: Will Ralph Lauren's (RL) Pricing Actions Aid Q1 Earnings Beat?
text: Ralph Lauren's (RL) Q1 results are expected to reflect gains from solid demand, improved pricing, brand strength, the expansion of digital and omni-channel capabilities, and growth across regions.
